$doc: RENDERED from core/policy/policy-data.json into OpenCode's enforced permission vocabulary. Merged into ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json by bin/leos-merge.py (user-owned file; never symlinked). `read` deny patterns block secret reads (deny is enforced even in auto mode); `bash` allow patterns pre-approve the fixed-subcommand set, everything else falls through to OpenCode's default. Schema is version-sensitive — verify keys against the installed opencode at setup.
